## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passes
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation was added or updated where behavior, commands, configuration, architecture, deployment, security, or user workflow changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry is not needed because release-please handles release notes
